metadata.name: Infinite Task Loop
metadata.description: Infinite task execution loop for continuous agent work. Runs in a permanent loop: ask → plan → confirm → execute → report → repeat. Only exit via teleport.

nodes.directive:
Ask the user what task they want to do next. Everything the user writes IS the task description.

⛔ CRITICAL: Do NOT execute, read, study, or analyze the task. Do NOT perform any actions. Your ONLY job is to capture what the user said in task_description and submit this step IMMEDIATELY. The workflow handles planning and execution in subsequent steps.
nodes.completionCondition: User described their task and agent submitted step immediately without performing any actions

task_description.description: Full description of the task the user wants done

nodes.completionCondition: Execution plan created with specific actionable steps

nodes.directive:
Present the execution plan to the user and ask for their confirmation.

Plan:
{{execution_plan}}

⛔ MANDATORY USER CONFIRMATION: You MUST ask the user and wait for their ACTUAL response. NEVER auto-approve. NEVER skip this confirmation under ANY circumstances. If you do not have a real response from the user — you have NOT completed this step.

CRITICALLY IMPORTANT — REACTION TO FEEDBACK:
If user said 'yes' / approved → plan_approved = 'yes'.
If user gave ANY feedback, corrections, or said 'no' → plan_approved = 'no'.
DO NOT fix the plan yourself! Set plan_approved = 'no' and write the user's feedback in user_feedback. The workflow will route to the revision branch automatically.
nodes.completionCondition: User has reviewed the plan and provided approval or feedback
Plan revised to address user feedback
Task executed according to the plan with verifiable results

execution_summary.description: Summary of what was done and the results

nodes.directive:
Report the execution results to the user and ask if they are satisfied.

Task: {{ask-task.task_description}}
What was done: {{execute-task.execution_summary}}

Present the results clearly and ask the user if the outcome is acceptable.

⛔ MANDATORY USER CONFIRMATION: You MUST ask the user and wait for their ACTUAL response. NEVER auto-approve. NEVER skip this confirmation under ANY circumstances. If you do not have a real response from the user — you have NOT completed this step.

CRITICALLY IMPORTANT — REACTION TO FEEDBACK:
If user said 'yes' / approved → results_approved = 'yes'.
If user gave ANY feedback or said 'no' → results_approved = 'no'.
DO NOT fix issues yourself! Set results_approved = 'no' and write the feedback in user_feedback. The workflow will route to full re-planning cycle automatically.
nodes.completionCondition: User has reviewed results and provided approval or feedback

nodes.hint: Use when you want to exit the infinite task loop and end the session
nodes.directive: The user wants to exit the task loop. Provide a brief summary of all tasks completed during this session.
